context: Salary ranges for India 2026, sourced from India Skills Report 2026, AmbitionBox, Levels.fyi, Naukri JobSpeak, Glassdoor India, Business Standard, and industry reports. Numbers are gross fixed pay; bonuses, ESOPs, and allowances are noted where significant. 'Top' means the 90th-percentile experienced practitioner — not a guarantee.

rankings.name: Investment Banker (Bulge Bracket)
rankings.entry_path: IIM 5-yr IPM or 2-yr MBA → Goldman Sachs / Morgan Stanley / JPMorgan / Citi
rankings.demand_growth: Steady; AI does not eat senior banker work
rankings.best_for: Driven, finance-curious students with strong quant + verbal
rankings.ap_specific: IIFT Kakinada (in AP) is now a feeder via IPMAT
rankings.source: Levels.fyi, Preplounge India, Goldman Sachs Glassdoor

rankings.name: AI / ML Engineer (especially GenAI)
rankings.entry_path: B.Tech CSE/AI → Microsoft / Google / Nvidia / Razorpay
rankings.demand_growth: +35% YoY — fastest in 2026 hiring data
rankings.best_for: Strong maths foundation + curiosity about ML systems

rankings.name: Super-specialist Doctor (Cardiology, Neurosurgery, Oncology)
rankings.demand_growth: Permanent shortage — India has 1 doctor per 1,500 against WHO's 1:1,000 target
rankings.best_for: Long horizon (12+ years), high stamina, BiPC stream

rankings.name: Tier-1 Corporate Lawyer (NLU graduate)
rankings.demand_growth: Strong; corporate India needs more deal lawyers than supplied
rankings.best_for: Reading-heavy, articulate students from any stream
rankings.ap_specific: DSNLU Vizag + NALSAR Hyderabad serve AP students

rankings.name: Chartered Accountant (Big 4 + Industry CFO track)
rankings.top_inr_cr: 0.5–2 (CFO at mid-size); partner at Big 4 ₹50 L–1 Cr+
rankings.entry_path: CA Foundation after XII → 4.5–5 yrs to qualify → PwC / Deloitte / EY / KPMG
rankings.demand_growth: Steady, cycle-resistant
rankings.best_for: Disciplined, numerical, willing to pass tough exams
rankings.source: ICAI, Business Standard CA Salary Guide 2026

rankings.name: AI Product Manager
rankings.entry_path: B.Tech + IIM/ISB/external PM bootcamp; or APM at Razorpay/Flipkart/Microsoft India
rankings.demand_growth: +40% YoY — AI productisation is the hottest 2026 role

rankings.name: Senior Data Scientist (AI-specialised)
rankings.demand_growth: +25% YoY

rankings.name: Software Engineer (Product Companies)
rankings.fresher_inr_lpa: 15–30 at FAANG India / Razorpay / Flipkart; 3.5–4.5 at services
rankings.demand_growth: Steady; product co. hiring up despite services slowdown

rankings.name: Commercial Pilot — Senior Captain
rankings.top_inr_cr: ₹1.5–2+ (₹15+ LPM at Senior Captain on widebody)
rankings.demand_growth: India needs 22,400+ pilots by FY 2030 (CAPA)
rankings.source: DGCA, FMS Aviation Academy, CAPA India

rankings.name: Semiconductor / VLSI Designer
rankings.entry_path: B.Tech ECE/EEE → M.Tech VLSI → top design firm
rankings.demand_growth: Massive — India's chip-fab push under MeitY Semicon Mission

rankings.name: Cybersecurity Lead / CISO
rankings.demand_growth: +30–35% YoY — fastest growing IT discipline

rankings.name: Equity Research Analyst / Portfolio Manager (CFA)
rankings.entry_path: CFA Level 1 in college → Big 4 / mutual fund → Charter after 4 yrs work
rankings.demand_growth: Strong; mutual fund AUM in India crossed ₹70 trillion

rankings.name: IAS / IPS / IFS Officer
rankings.top_inr_cr: 0.27 (₹2.25 LPM Cabinet Secretary) but with state-level influence
rankings.demand_growth: Permanent
rankings.note: Pure cash compensation under-states value; total package (Type-V/VI bungalow, security, transport, status) is materially higher.

rankings.name: Senior UX / Product Designer
rankings.entry_path: B.Des at NID / IDC IIT-B / Srishti via NID DAT or UCEED
rankings.demand_growth: Strong — digital-first hiring

rankings.name: IIM IPM Manager — Consulting / Tech PM track
rankings.entry_path: IPMAT Indore / Rohtak or JIPMAT after Class 12 — 5 yr integrated BBA+MBA
rankings.demand_growth: Steady

rankings.name: Robotics / Embodied AI Engineer
rankings.demand_growth: Emerging — automotive (EV), warehouse, drones

rankings.name: Fellow Actuary
rankings.demand_growth: India has fewer than 600 fellows — long-term shortage

rankings.name: Senior Scientist — Biopharma
rankings.entry_path: B.Tech Biotech → MS / PhD → Biocon, Bharat Biotech, Serum, Dr Reddy's
rankings.demand_growth: Strong post-COVID

rankings.name: Quant Researcher / HFT (Optiver, Jane Street, Tower)
rankings.demand_growth: Very limited supply — ~50 hires per year in India
rankings.note: Highest paying entry-level role accessible from India — but only for top maths/CS talent.

rankings.name: Independent CA Practice — Tax Boutique Partner
rankings.entry_path: CA → 3–5 yr Big 4 → solo or boutique
rankings.demand_growth: Strong — GST, family offices, NRI taxation
